results.title: Flowly Reviews - Read Customer Reviews of Flowly.world
results.content:
#### Personalized Data Portal

Users can track their wellness journey via an app that visualizes key metrics such as HRV scores, flow scores, heart rate graphs, enabling them to monitor progress over time.

#### Accessibility & Safety

The platform is non-invasive with easy-to-use slip-on VR headsets and biosensors included in subscriptions. It has undergone extensive user testing without reported negative side effects.

#### Community Engagement & Rewards

Flowly includes a community feature where users can connect for support. Engagement earns tokens ("flokens") redeemable for discounts or gifts which encourages ongoing participation in wellness activities.

### FlowlyPricing

#### Subscription [...] #### NIH-backed Platform

The platform has credible backing from the National Institutes of Health (NIH), which adds to its trustworthiness for chronic pain management without opioids.

#### Engaging Virtual Reality Experience

The app offers beautifully designed VR worlds that respond to users' heart rate, making the experience immersive, engaging, and encouraging for relaxation and meditation.

#### Improved Sleep Quality

Users have reported about 5% more deep sleep after consistent use of Flowly for just two weeks. It also helps users with breathing techniques that improve sleep quality.

#### Personalized Biofeedback Training

The app uses real-time data from the user's body performance (like heart rate) to tailor exercises, making it more effective than generic meditation apps.

results.content:
# Not sure if Flowly is right for you?

Reclaim your life from chronic pain and anxiety, and learn to manage your symptoms from the comfort of your home.  
Available for both Apple & Android mobile devices.

#### Contact

#### Resources

#### Policy

\ Flowly is not a medical device and is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.  
† Flowly is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Consult a medical professional before starting any new exercise program or using any health-related product. [...] Flowly for foot and back pain

Flowly has given me not one but many tools to combat the pain on a daily basis. Flowly is what I hope for the future of healthcare."

# Users stories

See how people around the world are changing their lives by doing Flowly

### "I've been getting about 5% more deep sleep than I was prior to Flowly and that's after only 2 weeks of consistent use."

### "I felt like my pain was controlling me. I am finally in the driver’s seat to where I can guide my life in the direction I need it to go."

### "My medication usually get my pain down to about between 0-2, which is exactly where the Flowly VR treatment get me also."

results.title: What is Flowly? (Animation)
results.content:
[Music] your pain is real your pain can be physical it can be mental your pain can even feel isolating but what if you could reclaim your body from the pain what if we could guide you to a universe that turns pain into comfort and anxiety into calm what if you could have a safe space designed for deep relaxation enter slowly flowley is a mobile app that combines virtual reality and biofeedback training to teach you how to reclaim your body and mind each day with virtual reality you can do at home slowly takes you on a journey through different worlds designed to bring you relaxation and comfort and using the sensor in your flowly kit you're able to do bio feedback training which collects your real-time heart rate from our sensor shows it to you and then teaches you how to control your [...] # What is Flowly? (Animation)
## Flowly: Your Virtual Clinic for Pain Management
676 subscribers
13 likes

### Description
1804 views
Posted: 23 Jul 2022
Flowly is a NIH-backed virtual clinic delivering the latest in pain science for people in pain who have struggled to find relief.

Our 12-week Healing from Pain program focuses on nonstructural pain, empowering our Heroes to manage pain, anxiety, and stress in their day-to-day lives. Flowly integrates behavioral health support through licensed therapists trained in pain psychology, along with a proprietary at-home VR and biofeedback system that enables self-guided practice.

Flowly is covered by several health insurance in select states!
Check if you're covered under your health plan:  

#flowly #app #virtualreality #pain #anxiety #stress [...] shows it to you and then teaches you how to control your heart this is science based on over 30 years of research and flowley itself has been studied in clinical trials backed by the national institutes of health imagine a life unlimited by pain imagine your life feeling safe and in control on this journey you are the hero experience slowly [Music]
